sail.FY2023-24: AMBIGUOUS: FY2022-23 value not reported in standardised table

sections.about: Particulate Matter measures dust and fine particulate emissions from material handling, sintering, pelletising, coke making, BF/BOF/EAF operations, captive power and fugitive sources. This is disclosed under BRSR Principle 6, Essential Indicator for air emissions other than GHG emissions. A lower value indicates better performance.
sections.performanceAndDrivers: Jindal Stainless led every year on PM, with 2.0841 kt in FY2022-23, 1.3133 kt in FY2023-24 and 1.6015 kt in FY2024-25. Tata improved consistently from 11 kt consolidated in FY2022-23 to 9 kt in FY2023-24 and 8 kt in FY2024-25, becoming the second-best performer in the latest year. JSW improved from 10.143 kt to 8.62 kt but worsened to 10.84 kt in FY2024-25, while SAIL improved from 11.62 kt in FY2023-24 to 10.7352 kt in FY2024-25. Tata’s improvement aligns with the company’s stated modernisation, upgraded pollution-control equipment and significant reduction in stack dust emissions in India; Jindal also discloses APCDs, fugitive-emission management and continuous air-quality monitoring as mitigation measures.
sections.tataPositioning: In FY2024-25, Tata ranked 2nd on PM, behind Jindal Stainless. Tata’s 8 kt was 6.3985 kt higher than Jindal’s 1.6015 kt, or approximately 400% above the best performer. Tata’s ranking improved from 3rd in FY2022-23 and FY2023-24 to 2nd in FY2024-25. This is Tata’s strongest air-emissions signal in the set: despite integrated BF-BOF scale, dust performance improved year-on-year, likely reflecting the impact of stack-dust control, dedusting, maintenance discipline and modernised pollution-control assets.
sections.targets: Tata discloses dust-reduction investments and stack-dust mitigation.
sections.comparabilityNotes: Tata Steel FY2022-23 is consolidated. SAIL FY2022-23 is not reported. Jindal Stainless values are converted from MT to kilotonnes.

flags.flagNote: SAIL FY2022-23 is not reported, so FY2023-24 trend cannot be assessed on a like-for-like numeric basis.
